raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Reclassifying J-59/La Grange Road as State Route 59 is intended to improve public safety and strengthen California’s wildfire emergency response system.",
    "J-59/La Grange Road serves thousands of residents, first responders, and travelers each year.",
    "Having well-maintained and reliable infrastructure for emergency evacuation is crucial in light of recent devastating wildfires.",
    "J-59/La Grange Road is a vital route used by CalFire and local communities during emergencies.",
    "Reclassifying J-59/La Grange Road would unlock access to state funding to improve road conditions and increase reliability.",
    "Between January 1, 2022 and March 31, 2025, there were 26 severe injuries and 3 fatalities involving constituents in Senate District 4.",
    "In particular, there were 12 severe injuries and 2 fatalities in Stanislaus County, and 13 severe injuries and 1 fatality in Tuolumne County."
  ]
}
```
